text: Very good basic course for everyone interested in the European Union . Here you can learn about the past and the present state of affairs in the EU , as well as get to know some future challenges . The course is filled with lots of EU - related facts and statistics and presents the EU from different points of view . I would say the course is quite a " light " one : there are no peer - reviewed assignments and quizzes are rather short and easy , but it definitely gives food for thought . Be aware that the videos are in French but with English subtitles .
